Name: Thunder-Stride
Plumage_Description: Naturally oily, causing rain and volcanic dust to slide off rather than sticking to the skin
Feet: Massive and three-toed, acting as natural snowshoes to prevent sinking into the soft ash dunes
Communication: Low-frequency 'thrumming' in their throats that humans feel rather than hear
Combat_Move: Kicking forward with enough force to punch through a breastplate or shatter a wagon wheel
Magical_Immunity: Illusion magic (visual hallucinations) is useless against them because they cannot see it
Bonding: Will only accept one rider. If that rider dies, the bird often starves itself or runs into the wastes to die
Saddle_Description: Specially designed leather seats with wooden mallets that the rider taps against the bird's spine to give directional commands
